title: Green Screen Sky
description: A texture pack that makes the sky a perfect green color. This can be keyed out in the post-production software of your choice.
body:
A texture pack that makes the sky a perfect green color. This can be keyed out in the post-production software of your choice.

 

This project only just recently started production, so be patient for newer versions of this pack for newer versions of Minecraft.

 

This pack requires optifine to work

(enable custom sky in optifine)

 

New CurseForge site: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/green-screen-sky

 






More images can be found here: https://imgur.com/a/VmppSpA
